tagline: June 11, 2026 The ai extract function is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 11, 2026 The ai extract function is now generally available. This function extracts structured data from text and documents according to a schema you provide, supporting nested objects, arrays, type validation, citations, and confidence scores.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
